summary: Block said it would cut more than 4,000 jobs as part of an overhaul to embed artificial intelligence across its operations.
evidenceQuote: Block said it will cut over 4,000 jobs, nearly half its workforce, as part of an overhaul to embed artificial intelligence across its operations.
notes: Reuters reported the move as a major AI-linked workforce cut.

sources.name: Reuters
sources.quote: Block said it will cut over 4,000 jobs, nearly half its workforce, as part of an overhaul to embed artificial intelligence across its operations.

summary: Pinterest said it planned to lay off less than 15% of its workforce while reallocating resources toward AI initiatives.
evidenceQuote: Pinterest said on Tuesday that it plans to lay off less than 15% of its workforce to cut back on office space and reallocate resources for its AI initiatives.
notes: TechCrunch cited a regulatory filing and estimated roughly 700 workers would be affected.

sources.name: TechCrunch
sources.quote: Pinterest said on Tuesday that it plans to lay off less than 15% of its workforce to cut back on office space and reallocate resources for its AI initiatives.

summary: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff said the company cut 4,000 customer support roles as AI reduced the need for headcount.
evidenceQuote: Salesforce has cut 4,000 of its customer support roles, CEO Marc Benioff recently said while discussing how artificial intelligence has helped reduce the company headcount.
notes: CNBC framed the cuts directly around Benioff's remarks about needing fewer heads with AI.

sources.name: CNBC
sources.quote: Salesforce has cut 4,000 of its customer support roles, CEO Marc Benioff recently said while discussing how artificial intelligence has helped reduce the company headcount.
